g.text: GL AIP SDK Command Line Interface.
A comprehensive CLI for managing GL AIP resources including agents, tools,
\b Examples: aip version # Show detailed version info
aip configure # Configure credentials aip accounts add
prod # Add account profile aip accounts use staging #
Switch account aip agents list # List all agents aip
tools create my_tool.py # Create a new tool aip agents run my-agent
\b Store multiple accounts via 'aip accounts add' and switch with 'aip
configure Configure AIP CLI credentials and settings interactively.
status Show connection status and basic info.
transcripts Inspect and manage cached agent transcripts.
update Update AIP SDK to the latest version from PyPI.
